ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot delicately holding a wine glass.  The movement will be slow and controlled to emphasize the careful handling of a fragile object. The robot will use its right arm, keeping the left arm at rest for balance. Frame 1 shows the arm extending toward the glass, preparing to lift it. Frame 2 shows the robot grasping the glass. Frame 3 shows the robot raising the glass slightly. Frame 4 shows the robot holding the glass steadily. Frame 5 shows the robot lowering the glass gently.

frames.beat: both arms rest, ready to hold
right arm extends, reaching for the glass
fingers gently close around the stem
the glass is lifted with careful grace
the arm returns to a resting position
